recommendations.title: Another Round
recommendations.overview: Four stagnant high school teachers decide to test out a theory that maintaining a constant level of intoxication will improve their overall lives.

recommendations.title: The Celebration
recommendations.overview: The family of a wealthy businessman gather to celebrate his 60th birthday. During the course of the party, his eldest son presents a speech that reveals a devastating secret that turns the night into a battle of truth and denial.

recommendations.title: The Commune

recommendations.title: Far from the Madding Crowd

recommendations.title: Submarino

recommendations.title: The Pursuit of Happyness
recommendations.overview: A struggling salesman takes custody of his son as he's poised to begin a life-changing professional career.

recommendations.title: It's All About Love

recommendations.title: Kursk

recommendations.title: Dear Wendy
recommendations.overview: In a blue-collar American town, a group of teens bands together to form the Dandies, a gang of gunslingers led by Dick Dandelion. Following a code of strict pacifism at odds with the fact that they all carry guns, the group eventually lets in Sebasti

recommendations.title: Mother
recommendations.overview: A mother lives quietly with her son. One day, a girl is brutally killed, and the boy is charged with the murder. Now, it's his mother's mission to prove him innocent.
